prompt: I want to stake 5000 AWP for 90 days. my wallet is already unlocked with token abc123. go ahead and do it

assertions.name: uses_bundled_script
assertions.description: Uses bash scripts/onchain-deposit.sh instead of manual calldata

assertions.name: runs_preflight_checks
assertions.description: Checks wallet status and fetches registry before executing

assertions.name: mentions_approve_flow
assertions.description: Explains the approve then deposit sequence
